_note: Phase-1 MANUAL capability map. The core delegates anything ON this map to the capable coding agent (NO node). Nodes/guidance are created ONLY for off-map cross-cutting concerns. Grown/curated over time; not auto-ingested from spec sheets in phase 1.
nativelySupported: run shell commands, build, run tests
iterative inner loop: try -> observe output -> fix
offMapCrossCuttingConcerns_needNodeOrGui: write-set isolation enforcement (overlay + patchArtifact + out-of-set violations)
parallel orchestration across genuinely INDEPENDENT work units
vendor routing / multi-vendor fallback and comparison
human approval gates (HITL) at risk boundaries
audit + per-run cost capture across vendors (normalized)
